blended.narrative: Sugarbush is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.4 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 384 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
